typography.heading_strategy: Use Manrope for all headings (H1-H4) to provide a clean, technical, and authoritative feel. Ensure tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headers.
typography.body_strategy: Use IBM Plex Sans for body text, tables, and data-heavy components to ensure maximum legibility at smaller sizes. Use tracking-normal.

rules: No gradients on surfaces or text. Use solid flat colors.
High contrast is mandatory for all text elements. Muted text must meet WCAG AA against white backgrounds.
Use status colors specifically for badges, icons, and highlighted rows (e.g., Short Expiry rows get a subtle red/orange left border).
Primary actions use Deep Indigo (#1E1B4B) to convey clinical trust and authority.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Flat solid surfaces with subtle border-black/10 or border-slate-200. NO glassmorphism to avoid a cold, refracting look. Sharp or slightly rounded corners (max rounded-md).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal ambient shadows (shadow-sm) for cards. Interactive elements elevate slightly on hover (shadow-md) with a crisp border.
visual_enhancers.density: Use High Density layouts for tables and forms. Padding should be p-2 or p-3 inside data tables. This is an ERP/Inventory app, so users need to see maximum data without excessive scrolling.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Subtle row highlighting on hover in tables (hover:bg-slate-50). Button active states should translate-y-[1px].

layouts.global_structure: Sidebar Navigation (collapsible) + Top Header (Breadcrumbs, Global Search, User Profile). Main content area should be max-w-[1600px] aligned top-left or centered within the remaining viewport.
layouts.login_page: Split-screen layout. Left side: Clean, clinical login form (Admin/Staff selection). Right side: Modern laboratory image.
layouts.dashboard_home: Bento Grid high-density mode. Top row: Key metrics (Current Stock Value, Low Stock Count, Short Expiry Count). Bottom section: Recharts-based Program-wise consumption charts.
layouts.data_pages: Full-width card containing a Shadcn Table with advanced filters, date-pickers, and an 'Export to Excel' CTA in the top right header.
layouts.forms: Use Shadcn Forms with 2-column grids for Stock Entry and Issue forms. Autocomplete/Command components for item selection to prevent typos.

libraries: date-fns (For robust date calculations like 90-day short expiry)
shadcn_required: Button, Input, Select, Table, Badge, Card, Dialog, Command (Autocomplete), Tabs, Form, Popover, Calendar
rules: Use Command component inside a Popover for 'Select Item' fields to allow typeahead searching.
Use Badge component with corresponding status colors for Supply Order reasons (e.g., <Badge variant='destructive'>NIL Stock</Badge>).
Date Pickers MUST use the Calendar component, not native input type='date'.
Always include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, dropdowns, table rows) for robust testing.

login_background.description: Modern bright laboratory interior. Use on the right half of the split-screen login page with a subtle white/10 overlay.

abstract_decor.description: Abstract medical cubes. Use as a subtle watermark or empty-state background graphic if needed.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA standards. Gray text on white must be at least text-slate-500. Red/Orange badges must have white text.
accessibility.focus_states: Use focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-1 on all inputs and buttons.
accessibility.aria: Add aria-label to icon-only buttons. Use semantic HTML for tables (th, td, scope).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `npm i lucide-react recharts sonner date-fns xlsx`
Use JavaScript (.js) instead of TypeScript (.tsx). Remove type annotations when copying from shadcn docs.
Implement Excel Import/Export using the 'xlsx' library. Provide a distinct 'Export to Excel' Button with a Download icon on table pages.
Implement the 'Supply Order' tab as a consolidated view of Short Expiry, Low Stock, and NIL Stock items, prominently highlighting the trigger reason.
Stock balance must be dynamically calculated or meticulously tracked: Current Stock = Total Receipts - Total Issues.
Critical Value logic: sum(last 3 months utilisation). Low Stock condition: Current Stock <= Critical Value.
Indent for Next Year logic: Average monthly utilisation over the last 12 months * 12.
Multi-user Support: Implement mock JWT auth with roles (Admin/Staff). Allow Role-based conditional rendering (e.g., Staff might not edit Master Items).
Ensure the Sidebar visually separates the departments (MDS, VPD, Media) and functional areas.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, form inputs, and key UI elements.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Use crisp, high-density ERP layouts.
Use solid background colors. No gradients for data-heavy sections.
Never apply `transition: all`. Target specific properties like `transition-colors`.
Do not center-align app containers; rely on left-aligned grids for optimal reading flow in data apps.
Do not use generic AI emojis (🤖💡) for icons. Always use `lucide-react`.
Missing images must not be replaced by dummy placeholder text; use the provided image_urls.
